note.en: Jackson turns total artistic control into pop that struts, confronts, and still asks the man in the mirror to change.
note.zh: 杰克逊把全面的创作掌控化成昂首向前的流行乐，在对抗世界时仍追问镜中人该如何改变。

note.en: A dense analog prayer for collective resistance, where private desire and public struggle move to the same pulse.
note.zh: 一篇献给集体抗争的浓稠模拟录音祷文，让私人欲望与公共斗争共享同一脉搏。

note.en: Gospel warmth, hip-hop swing, and unhurried sensuality redraw the vocabulary of modern soul.
note.zh: 福音乐的温度、嘻哈的摇摆与从容的感官气息，共同重写了现代灵魂乐的语汇。

note.en: Yufu rebuilds himself through 1970s soul and funk, letting warm grooves carry a hard-won return to music.
note.zh: Yufu 借七十年代灵魂与放克重建自己，让温暖律动承载一次来之不易的音乐归途。

note.en: Rock urgency and R&B finesse frame a turn-of-the-century search for honesty amid the noise of modern life.
note.zh: 摇滚的冲劲与 R&B 的细腻包住世纪末的城市焦虑，追问人在喧嚣中能否诚实地找到自己。

note.en: Caesar measures the price of vulnerability while caught between the need for truth, intimacy, and approval.
note.zh: Caesar 在真相、亲密与被认可的渴望之间徘徊，衡量袒露自我究竟要付出多少代价。

note.en: Prince turns romantic turmoil and self-invention into maximal rock-soul theater built for stage and screen.
note.zh: Prince 把情感风暴与自我塑造推向极致，写成一场同时属于舞台与银幕的摇滚灵魂剧。

note.en: Caesar returns to faith, family, and his father’s shadow to ask what inheritance remains when belief grows complicated.
note.zh: Caesar 回到信仰、家庭与父亲的影子里，追问当信念变得复杂，我们究竟继承了什么。

title: Songs in the Key of Life

note.en: Wonder maps love, injustice, childhood, and faith with a generosity too expansive for any single genre.
note.zh: Wonder 以超越单一类型的丰盛笔触，描绘爱情、不公、童年与信仰共同组成的人生全景。

note.en: Hill turns heartbreak, motherhood, faith, and self-knowledge into the life lessons no classroom could teach.
note.zh: Hill 把心碎、母职、信仰与自我认识写成一堂任何教室都无法教授的人生课。

note.en: Gaye answers war, poverty, and racial fracture with a seamless prayer for empathy instead of escalation.
note.zh: Gaye 面对战争、贫困与种族撕裂，不以怒吼升级冲突，而以连绵的灵魂乐为共情祈祷。

note.en: Khalil Fong uses soul, jazz, and R&B to unfold love in its many forms without smoothing away its complications.
note.zh: 方大同以灵魂、爵士与 R&B 展开爱的不同面貌，同时保留每段关系里难以磨平的复杂余温。
